title: The Shattered truth
description: something is in your world, you cant tell what it is.
body:
*they want you to leave.*

****

----- THINGS TO KNOW


Credits to End_Rage for the Fratured moon resource pack 
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fractured-moon


**if you want the best experience use [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/set-time-doesnt-reset-day-count-set-time-doesnt](https://modrinth.com/mod/stdrdc) and [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/all](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

**And make sure to enable the Resource packs that came with the mod for the full experience**



THIS MOD CAN CRASH YOUR GAME AND OR BAN YOU - SO DONT ADD IT INTO YOUR NORMAL WORLDS IF YOU DON'T WANT THAT

AS OF THIS TIME THERE ARE NO CONFIGS FOR THIS MOD (there will be soon) 



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Crash - starts to spawn on day 4 and on - only spawns on surface - crashes your game if he spots you and gets near you 

 

Shaper - only spawns in the caves - in the caves he looks like steve but if you get near him he turns into its true form - True shaper - in this form it can break blocks and lasts for a few minutes until it despawns - if killed it makes it turn night and it starts to rain + he can play sounds or put stuff on your screen when aggravated 

 

Smiler - spawns anywhere - this entity is more of a passive entity just watching you or spawns at your bed if slept sometimes - does not like Crash if he spawns Smiler auto despawns and says watch out

 

Hitbox - this entity starts to spawn on day 7 - only spawns on surface - this entity spawns in air but when aggroed - Hitbox aggroed - it falls back on the floor and starts chasing the player but when killed the player he crashes your game 

 

Follower - starts to spawn on day 96 - this entity is a tall entity and the main creator of the incident it just stares at you and doesnt do much else but it does crash your game if you get near it - FINAL Follower - this one is the same as before but it slowly walks towards you but if it gets near you it starts to run after you and if it gets to close it bans you from your world 

</details>



 







This mod is a semi-slow burn mod and theres more updates to come 



theres a few entitys and structures of right now and random events to happen 

 

needs geckolib

 

have fun!!! !
